business.name: Just Us Pools
business.tagline: From swamp green to crystal clear

hero.headline: *Green to blue* — that's what we do
hero.subheadline: Columbia's pool team that shows up when we say we will. No shortcuts, no excuses.

services.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
services.description: Skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing. Your pool stays swim-ready week after week.

services.title: Chemical Treatment
services.description: Green water turned crystal clear. We know exactly what chemicals to add and when.

services.title: Pool Equipment Repair
services.description: Pumps, filters, heaters that quit working. We fix what's broken, replace what's done.

services.title: Emergency Pool Service
services.description: When your pool goes from blue to green overnight. We get it back fast.

about.heading: Columbia pool pros
about.body: We're the local family team that answers the phone. One call gets you real people who know pools inside and out.

reviews.name: Vanessa S.
reviews.text: Bought our house in September and very happy with Just Us Pools. Great to deal with and kept our pool clean.

reviews.name: Mellissa E.
reviews.text: My new pool go-to company! Turned my pool from green to blue at a reasonable price. Knowledgeable and professional.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Pool was swamp green, now crystal clear. Great service with accurate knowledge. Locally and family owned.

cta.heading: Ready for a crystal clear pool?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and the pool service Columbia trusts. Call today or get your quote online.
